race.comment: CAESAR (4) has JMac up and was too good for the 64 graders at Canterbury first up. He's won a Rosehill trial since with JMac aboard, and he stays with him. The Snowden yard is flying, and the progressive gelding can go back-to-back. READY TO SHINE (5) raced handy and won this grade/trip at Warwick Farm, heavily supported. Peaks and Lloyd stays aboard. He can fight out the finish. ZOURIPPER (3) resumes and is proven fresh. Has two trials under the saddle and has plenty of scope for improvement. Jumps from the paint and Rawiller's engagement interests. SILENTSAR (1) resumed in a 78 at Randwick in good order but has been plain the two since. Comes back a level for this and he'd be in the finish near best. May show more.
